extName.description: Extension name shown in the Chrome Web Store and toolbar.

extDescription.message: Connects the Kaiord editor to your WHOOP recovery & sleep data via OAuth (bring your own WHOOP developer app)
extDescription.description: Extension description shown in the Chrome Web Store.

checking.description: Status text while the popup probes the connection.

checkingAria.description: Accessible label for the checking status pill.

addCredentials.description: Status text when no WHOOP credentials are stored.

reconnectNeeded.description: Status text when the WHOOP session needs re-authentication.

connectedToWhoop.description: Status text when the bridge is connected.

notConnected.description: Status text when credentials exist but there is no session.

openingWhoop.description: Status text while the OAuth flow is launching.

connectionFailed.description: Fallback status text when connecting fails.

couldNotSave.description: Fallback status text when saving credentials fails.

reconnectNeededError.description: Sync line when re-auth is needed, with the failure reason.

reconnectToImport.description: Sync line when re-auth is needed and no reason is available.

lastImport.description: Sync line showing when the last import happened.

reconnect.description: Primary button label when already authenticated.

connectWhoop.description: Primary button label when not yet authenticated.

disconnect.description: Secondary button that revokes the WHOOP connection.

justNow.description: Relative time for a very recent import.

clientId.description: Label for the WHOOP OAuth client ID input.

clientSecret.description: Label for the WHOOP OAuth client secret input.

saveCredentials.description: Button that stores the entered WHOOP credentials.

credsHint.message: Register your own WHOOP app at developer.whoop.com and paste its credentials. They stay in this extension and never reach the web page.
credsHint.description: Explanatory hint below the credential inputs.
